meta.title: If the F-22 is so good, why'd the US buy the F-35?
meta.description:
It's not uncommon to hear people talk about the F-22 and F-35 as though they both fill the same roles, but the truth is, they have very different jobs. 

Here's a breakdown on the differences between these aircraft, and their places within America's approach to air warfare. 

#short #shorts #airpower #f22 #f22raptor #f35 #stealth #stealthfighter
